0.text: Loculated pleural effusions with Hounsfield Unit measurements approximately 4 to 12

1.text: Mass-like lesion approximately 3.5x2 cm with irregular, spiculated margins in the paramediastinal region of the left hemithorax

2.text: Poorly demarcated mass from the pulmonary conus and aortic arch in the aortopulmonary window

3.text: Medial atelectasis in the lingular segment of the left lung

4.text: Localized pleural effusion in the left hemithorax

5.text: Areas of increased density in the lung parenchyma adjacent to the effusion in the posterior aspect of the left upper lobe and superior segment of the left lower lobe
